name: Douglas National Bank
description_short: Douglas National Bank is a community bank based in Douglas, Georgia, offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and mobile banking services.
description_long:
Douglas National Bank operates as a traditional community bank headquartered in Douglas, Georgia at 211 E. Ward Street. The institution has been serving the local market with an emphasis on personal service and relationship banking. The bank's website and customer-facing materials emphasize a commitment to quality service, teamwork, and customer satisfaction through their employee code of conduct. The bank positions itself as a friendly, accessible alternative to larger regional and national banking institutions.

The bank offers a range of consumer and business banking products. On the personal side, they provide Personal Checking accounts, Senior Checking accounts, and Savings Accounts. They also offer Loans and Mortgages for both personal and business customers. The bank has invested in modern banking conveniences including mobile deposit, mobile wallet integration, ATM deposits, and a mobile app (DNB Mobile) available on iOS and Android platforms. Online account opening is available but is restricted to existing customers only.

Douglas National Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on local, personalized customer service. Their marketing materials highlight employee commitment cards that stress urgency, complaint resolution ownership, positive communication, integrity, and creating a welcoming atmosphere. The bank maintains local phone support (912-384-2233 and 912-384-4444) and a physical branch location. They offer mobile banking conveniences comparable to larger institutions while maintaining a community-focused approach.

As a traditional community bank, Douglas National Bank is best suited for customers who value local relationships and personalized service over digital-first banking. The limitation of online account opening to existing customers may frustrate new customers seeking completely remote banking experiences. The website provides limited information about specific product features, rates, or fees, requiring customers to call for detailed information. For consumers seeking comprehensive banking with investment services, this institution appears to have limited investment offerings beyond mortgages and loans. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Local community bank with 24/7 phone support lines (912-384-2233 and 912-384-4444)
Offers Senior Checking accounts specifically designed for older customers
Mobile deposit and ATM deposit capabilities for convenient banking
Mobile wallet integration and DNB Mobile app for iOS and Android
Physical branch location in Douglas, Georgia for in-person service
Employee service commitment emphasizing complaint resolution and customer urgency
Comprehensive product offerings including checking, savings, loans, and mortgages
cons: Online account opening is restricted to existing customers only; new customers must call
Website lacks specific information about interest rates, fees, or product features
Limited investment services beyond basic loans and mortgages
No apparent online mortgage pre-qualification or loan application tools
Serves primarily Douglas, Georgia area with no mention of multi-state operations
best_for: Community-focused consumers who value personal relationships with their bank
Seniors seeking dedicated Senior Checking products and local service
Existing customers wanting to consolidate banking with a familiar local institution
Small business owners seeking relationship-based lending and local support
diagnosis: Douglas National Bank is best for existing customers and community members in the Douglas, Georgia area who prioritize personalized, local banking relationships. The main caveat is that new customers cannot open accounts online and must call to begin the relationship, and the bank provides minimal digital information about rates and fees online.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
